name: doc-convert-tool
description: 简单、高效的在线文档格式转换工具集

scripts.build:backend: python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python -m pip install pyinstaller && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --name backend-server --distpath backend/dist --workpath backend/build backend/main.py
scripts.build:backend:linux: python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r backend/requirements.txt && python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages pyinstaller && python3 -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --name backend-server --distpath backend/dist --workpath backend/build backend/main.py
scripts.build:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); ['installer', 'portable'].forEach(dir => fs.mkdirSync('release/' + pkg.version + '/' + dir, { recursive: true }))" && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend:linux && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); fs.mkdirSync('release/' + pkg.version + '/linux', { recursive: true })" && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz

author: 鲲穹AI
